metadata.title: Build a Task-Brief Validator with Claude
_variant_todo: rewrite every beat narration_text in the Teardown register (voices/teardown/VOICE.md + CLAUDE-BRAND.md) — voice only, facts unchanged
signature tangent 0-1 per video, ONLY on a clear opportunity (see SKILL)
swap the outro to the Claude outro from AUTHOR.MD :: NikBearBrown
then build audience-namespaced (audio in the new voice, scenes in the new palette)

skin_warnings: B00: palette=claude but the cold open is 'un-annotated' — COLD OPEN LAW wants ClaudeComposerAsk
B09: palette=claude but the outro is 'NikBearBrownOutro' — OUTRO LAW wants ClaudeTitleOutro

beats.narration_text: This is Musinique. A task brief with a missing Exclusions field is an implicit permission slip for the AI to decide something the human thought was decided.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: This is Liam, in for Bear. A task brief with a missing Exclusions field is an implicit permission slip for the AI to decide something the human thought was deci

beats.narration_text: The 7-field CoWork template exists because delegation requires an interface contract — Objective, Allowed Sources, Exclusions, Output Artifact, Decision Rules, Review Checkpoints, Stop Conditions. Missing any one field creates an ambiguity that surfaces only when the output is wrong.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: The 7-field CoWork template exists because delegation requires an interface contract — Objective, Allowed Sources, Exclusions, Output Artifact, Decision Rules,

beats.narration_text: A release campaign is a build problem. You have a deadline, a set of deliverables — pitch email, social copy, playlist submissions, distributor forms — and a sequence that matters. The same approach that ships software on schedule ships music on schedule. The machine doesn't get tired on Friday before a Monday release.

artifactLines: The same tools the platforms use — pointed back at you.
Roll your own. Own the deck.

beats.narration_text: Score this task brief against the 7-field CoWork template. Flag each missing or underspecified field with an explanation of why that gap will cause problems.

props.command: claude "Read this task brief and score it against the 7-field CoWork template. Flag each missing or underspecified field with an explanation of why that gap will cause problems." < brief.md

beats.narration_text: The scoring script loops over all 7 fields, checks presence and specificity, and produces a scored report with a delegation-readiness rating.

props.title: validator.py

beats.narration_text: Validator scores a 4-field brief: 3 fields flagged missing — Exclusions, Stop Conditions, Review Checkpoints. Delegation readiness: 57 percent — NOT READY. Each missing field gets a one-line explanation of what the AI will decide in its absence.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Validator scores a 4-field brief: 3 fields flagged missing — Exclusions, Stop Conditions, Review Checkpoints. Delegation readiness: 57 percent — NOT READY. Each

beats.narration_text: Add a second brief with all 7 fields but vague Decision Rules: use judgment.

props.command: claude "Score this revised brief. Decision Rules field says: use judgment." < brief_v2.md

beats.narration_text: All 7 fields present — completeness 100 percent. But specificity score: 71 percent. Decision Rules flagged: use judgment is not a decision rule; it's a delegation of judgment itself. Completeness does not equal quality.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: All 7 fields present — completeness 100 percent. But specificity score: 71 percent. Decision Rules flagged: use judgment is not a decision rule; it's a delegati

beats.narration_text: The 7-field template is an interface contract. Every missing field is an implicit permission slip — the AI decides something the human assumed was decided. Completeness checks presence; specificity checks whether the field actually constrains the AI.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: The 7-field template is an interface contract. Every missing field is an implicit permission slip — the AI decides something the human assumed was decided. Comp

beats.narration_text: Next: measure which tasks belong to Claude versus human with a routing matrix.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Next: measure which tasks belong to Claude versus human with a routing matrix.

beats.narration_text: Musinique. Brutalist and Educational AI. nikbearbrown.com.
